# Ascendly  B2B Revenue Systems

> Ascendly engineers end-to-end revenue systems for high-ticket B2B companies:
> inbound capture, outbound pipeline, AI-powered deal follow-up, and full ROI tracking.
> Not a lead gen agency  a revenue conversion system.

## Pages

- [Home](https://ascendly.one/): Full-funnel revenue system overview  inbound capture, outbound engine, AI follow-up, pipeline visibility, and ROI attribution for B2B companies with $30k+ deal sizes.
- [Services](https://ascendly.one/services): Two core offerings  Revenue Automation System (end-to-end pipeline to close) and Outbound Pipeline Engine (standalone cold email + LinkedIn outreach with meeting booking).
- [About Us](https://ascendly.one/aboutus): Founded by Rosis Sitoula (Revenue Systems Architect). 500+ campaigns executed, $50M+ pipeline generated, 2K+ qualified opportunities created for B2B clients.
- [Testimonials](https://ascendly.one/testimonials): Client reviews from Matt Leta (FutureWorks), Michael Won (Nett Solutions PPC), Steve Paganelli (Webaholics), Peter Brand (Insight Media Labs), and five more B2B leaders.

## What We Do

Ascendly builds revenue systems, not campaigns. The difference:

- **Inbound Capture**: Every high-intent website visitor identified within 15 minutes.
- **Lead Qualification**: Enriched, scored, and routed before reaching a calendar.
- **Multi-Channel Outreach**: Email + LinkedIn sequences running in parallel.
- **AI Deal Follow-Up**: Follow-up drafted within 2 minutes of every sales call ending.
- **Stale Deal Reactivation**: Daily tracking; automatic re-engagement of gone-quiet deals.
- **Live Pipeline Visibility**: Shared Notion pipeline with real-time updates.
- **Revenue Attribution**: Pipeline created, deals progressed, revenue generated  tracked.

## Who This Is For

B2B companies with $30,000–$3M+ customer value. Long or multi-step sales cycles.
Teams generating pipeline but not converting enough of it.
Founder-led or lean sales teams that need a system, not more headcount.

## Key Stats

- 2,000+ qualified opportunities generated
- 300 deals closed by clients
- 3–6× pipeline growth typical within 120 days
- 96% client retention rate
- 6 long-term revenue partners
